message:
fix(core): resolve 4 compile errors + 4 clippy warnings in test targets

- events.rs: fix runtime_compat::Builder → RuntimeBuilder, add CompatRuntime import
- orphan_reaper.rs: fix RuntimeBuilder::new_current_thread → current_thread, add CompatRuntime
- recorder_migration.rs: add CompatRuntime import for block_on trait method
- workflows/context.rs: add CompatRuntime import for block_on trait method
- workflows/descriptors.rs: remove unnecessary hashes from raw string literals (clippy)
- workflows/coordination.rs: use texts.values() instead of (_, text) iteration (clippy)

Also applies rustfmt to all touched files.

Validation: cargo check -p frankenterm-core --all-targets PASS
Validation: cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --all-targets -- -D warnings PASS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
